title: Yggdrasil: Design per-node identity-preserving transport
description: Design and prototype per-node identity-preserving Yggdrasil participation for constrained LICHEN nodes. A stock gateway-owned daemon cannot proxy another node's native 0200::/8 source. Evaluate a control/data-plane split or constrained participant that keeps each node's private key on-node and interoperates with unmodified Yggdrasil.
design: A stock gateway-owned yggdrasil-go daemon cannot forward native 0200::/8 packets sourced from or destined to another node identity; it accepts only its own AddrForKey identity and routed 0300::/8 subnet. LICHEN chose stable per-node native /128s and rejects gateway-dependent 0300::/8 addressing. Design must therefore make each constrained node a logical Yggdrasil participant under its own key, without exporting node private keys to the gateway. Evaluate a constrained transport/control-plane split, not TUN proxying or source spoofing.
acceptance_criteria: Specify and prototype a per-node identity-preserving Yggdrasil participation model; demonstrate bidirectional traffic through an unmodified Yggdrasil network with source /128 validation; nodes retain private keys; no gateway-owned 0300::/8 substitution; add independent interop tests before enabling non-local native routing in the baseline.
